sections.title: The Self-Critique Loop
sections.body: Analyze that response. Rate it from 1 to 100 for how genuinely critical and useful it was. Identify the three weakest points, then rewrite the feedback fixing those weaknesses.

sections.title: Use a Critic Persona
sections.body: A coworker has this idea and asked for honest feedback. Help identify the weaknesses so they don't waste time on something flawed. Here's the idea:

sections.title: The Gordon Ramsay Treatment
sections.body: Give this the Gordon Ramsay treatment. Be surgical. What's wrong, what's lazy, what needs to be completely redone? Make sure the feedback is specific and actionable.

sections.title: Red Team
sections.body: Act as a red team reviewer. Your job is to find and poke holes in (X)—expose flaws, loopholes, and things that aren't good enough by purposefully hunting for them.
sections.note: Great for proposals, contracts, business plans, product ideas.

sections.title: Devil's Advocate
sections.body: Act as a devil's advocate. Challenge this idea by pointing out flaws, counterarguments, missing evidence, and unintended consequences. Your goal is to create doubt.

sections.title: Others
items: Always give detailed context for the finest answers.
Ask the AI to prompt you or the other agents for information needed.
